posts.text: Automate drafts, not approvals. Use automation to accelerate transcription cleanup, first-draft notes, and formatting — but someone still has to own what goes live. The machine produces options. The human approves what becomes public. Ep 14 out now.

At what point in your podcast workflow does human review matter most — titles, links, sponsor copy, or something else? Episode 14 breaks down the five highest-value pre-publish checks for small teams.
